title: Enterospermum borbonicum

intro: Enterospermum borbonicum, also known as the 'French lavender', is a plant species endemic to the island of Réunion. It has been traditionally used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and bloating due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties.
